data.description: Get ready to enhance product sourcing, private labeling, and manufacturing at NHS Concept to Commerce in March 2027. This event marks a pivotal moment in the industry, showcasing new opportunities and innovations for businesses. data.title: Ola Sol Leads the Low-ABV Cocktail Category with a Three-Product Ecosystem That Gives Any Beer and Wine-Licensed Establishment the Ability to Serve Cocktails
data.description: After being established for two years, the high-end agave wine company has received a stellar 93-point rating from Wine Enthusiast, expanded to over 325 distribution points in California, and achieved a remarkable 1,000% increase in sales year-over-year. This growth has culminated in their recent accomplishments, with the brand making significant strides since its inception in Los Angeles on April 13, 2026.

data.title: Telix Pharma Gains As Regeneron Tie-Up Targets Solid Tumor Programs
data.description: Telix Pharmaceuticals Limited (NASDAQ: TLX) stock is seeing an increase in premarket trading on Monday following a partnership announcement with Regeneron Pharmaceuticals Inc. (NASDAQ: REGN). Regeneron, a US-based biotechnology company, and Telix, a radiopharmaceutical company, are joining forces to develop advanced radiopharmaceutical therapies. This collaboration aims to strengthen Telix's position in precision oncology by utilizing its expertise in radiopharmaceutical development and manufacturing. The partnership will involve sharing commercialization costs and profits. Telix's radiopharmaceutical development platform and global manufacturing capabilities will be combined with Regeneron's biologics expertise, specifically in bispecific antibody discovery. The collaboration will target multiple solid tumor indications from Regeneron's antibody portfolio.

data.title: Acclaimed Director Hirokazu Kore-eda Named Recipient of the 2nd TAKANAWA GATEWAY CITY AWARD at SSFF & ASIA 2026
data.description: The 2nd TAKANAWA Award will be presented at the Short Shorts Film Festival & Asia's Opening Ceremony on May 25, 2026, in Tokyo. This festival is among Asia's biggest international short film festivals accredited by Academy Awards®.

data.title: Prairie Cannabis Launches 420 Deals and Giveaway
data.description: Prairie Cannabis in Chicago is starting the 420 season ahead of time in 2026 by introducing a range of special offers, extending operating hours, and hosting a giveaway that connects with the community. The "Because I Got High" Giveaway also commenced on April 1, allowing patrons to participate.

data.title: Focus Health Announces Rebranding of Dallas Emergency Facility to ER of White Rock
data.description: Dallas-based healthcare management service organization, Focus Health, recently unveiled the rebranding of its managed emergency facility in Dallas. The facility, previously named Total Point Emergency Room NWH Dallas and situated at 10705 E..., has been officially rebranded. The announcement was made on April 8, 2026, marking an important milestone for the organization as it enhances its presence in the local healthcare sector.

data.title: Human Resources Strategist Shares Guide to Help Employees Reclaim Their Power and Well-Being while Navigating Dysfunctional Work Environments
data.description: A published writer presents effective techniques for enhancing self-awareness, self-regulation, and self-nurturing to assist individuals in transitioning from surviving to flourishing. Recently, in Plano, Texas on April 13, 2026, a survey conducted by Businessolver in August 2024 as part of their yearly State of the Workplace Empathy report examined respondents' perspectives on various aspects related to empathy and work dynamics.

data.title: Adsposure Kicks Off Fifth Annual Transit Awards, Celebrating the Best in Transit Advertising
data.description: On April 20, public voting will commence to acknowledge excellence in transit advertising across the nation. The 2025 Adsposure Transit Awards ceremony will honor the top performers in mobile out-of-home media. Adsposure encourages public engagement in this voting process to recognize outstanding achievements in the industry.

data.title: Equip Academy to Help Contractors & Landscapers Grow Business
data.description: In Louisville, Kentucky on April 13, 2026, Equip Academy was announced as a comprehensive training program offered by Equip Exposition, the leading annual trade show in the industry. This training package, available both in-person and online, is designed to assist contractors and landscapers in addressing the ongoing business obstacles they face. With a focus on tackling current economic conditions, Equip Academy aims to equip professionals with the necessary skills and knowledge.

data.title: Core Solutions Introduces the Intelligent Care Record, Setting a New Standard for Behavioral Health
data.description: A cutting-edge system has been introduced that integrates artificial intelligence directly into healthcare records to provide immediate insights, enhance workflows, and offer ethically developed intelligence for providers in behavioral health and intellectual and developmental disabilities (IDD). This innovative solution, launched by Core Solutions (Core), a prominent player in AI-driven technologies, promises to revolutionize the sector. The development was announced on April 13, 2026, in King of Prussia, Pennsylvania. This system aims to improve efficiency and decision-making for healthcare providers by incorporating advanced AI capabilities into patient records.

data.title: Americas Cardroom Unveils $10M Dual Mystery Bounty Venoms This Sunday
data.description: Americas Cardroom in SAN JOSE, Costa Rica will be hosting two online poker events as part of a Special High Five Edition. The Dual Mystery Bounty Venoms, set to take place this weekend, will include a total of $10 million in guaranteed prize pools.

data.title: Truss Financial Group Secures Top 2026 Scotsman Guide Non-QM Rankings
data.description: Truss Financial Group, based in LADERA RANCH, Calif., proudly disclosed their impressive standings in the 2026 Scotsman Guide rankings, which demonstrate their operational scope in Non-QM, investor, and self-employed borrower lending. The rankings indicate the firm's prominent national placements and commendable performance in these key areas. The recognition showcases Truss Financial Group's expertise in catering to a diverse range of borrowers, solidifying their position as a leader in the industry.

data.title: Zoomd Technologies to Report Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: A conference call is scheduled for April 28, 2026 at 11:00 AM Eastern Time. On April 13, 2026, Zoomd Technologies Ltd. (TSXV: ZOMD) (OTC: ZMDTF) and its wholly-owned subsidiary Zoomd Ltd. will be hosting the call. The companies, collectively known as "Zoomd," specialize in marketing technology (MarTech) for user acquisition.

data.title: GIS QSP Announces Claviger: The First Governance Operating System for AI-Powered Execution
data.description: Facing a worldwide AI Governance deficiency due to the overlapping regulatory and operational requirements, GIS Quantum Solutions Practice (GIS QSP) - a renowned entity specializing in cutting-edge cybersecurity and critical infrastructure defense - is stepping up. This prominent organization, headquartered in Atlanta, has worked tirelessly to bridge the gap in AI governance. As of April 13, 2026, GIS QSP continues to lead the charge in this field, advocating for enhanced measures to address the evolving challenges.
